name: Minotaur Exploration Limited
summary: Minotaur Exploration Limited, together with its subsidiaries, explores for, evaluates, and develops mineral properties in Australia. The company explores for copper, gold, zinc, lead, and silver deposits. It holds interests in various mineral exploration tenements located in South Australia, Queensland, and Western Australia. Minotaur Exploration Limited was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Norwood, Australia.
